findings.title: Photo upload accepts arbitrary extension; stored payload with conditional RCE
findings.root_cause: StorageService::storeClinicalPhoto has no extension allowlist or magic-byte sniff; stores on disk('public') served via /storage/ symlink.
findings.evidence: apps/api/app/Services/StorageService.php:13-23; refuter verify_rce_xss.json (RCE refuted on php artisan serve, payload returned as base64).
repro: GET /storage/clinical/.../shell.php -> 200 (no execution on dev server; would execute on nginx+php-fpm).
findings.fix: Add 'regex:/\.(png|jpg|jpeg|webp|heic)$/i' to filename validation. @getimagesize() check. Move to disk('private') + signed URLs. Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff on responses.
findings.refuter_verdict: RCE on live server REFUTED; upload gap CONFIRMED; severity downgraded from Critical to High

findings.title: Login 500 with full stack trace when level/role omitted
findings.root_cause: AuthController.php:23 uses $validated['level'] ?? $validated['role']; ?? cannot fall back to absent key.
repro: POST /api/login {"username":"kasir","password":"simkk-2026"} -> 500 ErrorException 'Undefined array key "role"' at AuthController.php:23 with full trace depth 36.
findings.fix: Change validation to 'level' => 'required_without:role|string|in:Kasir,Terapis,Gudang,Manajer', 'role' => 'required_without:level|string|in:Kasir,Terapis,Gudang,Manajer'. Set APP_DEBUG=false in non-local env.

findings.title: /api/transactions/pay returns 500 + stack trace on insufficient stock
findings.root_cause: TransaksiService::decrementStock throws RuntimeException; no handler maps to 422/409; APP_DEBUG renders full trace.
findings.evidence: apps/api/app/Services/TransaksiService.php:136-148; bootstrap/app.php only sets shouldRenderJsonWhen; no app/Exceptions/Handler.php.
repro: POST /api/transactions/pay items=[{serviceId:7,qty:99999}] -> 500 RuntimeException 'Stok FIFO tidak cukup untuk produk #2 (butuh 99999, tersedia 18)' with file=TransaksiService.php line=147.
findings.fix: Replace RuntimeException with ValidationException::withMessages(['items'=>...]) in decrementStock. Register renderable in bootstrap/app.php for RuntimeException -> 409. APP_DEBUG=false.

findings.title: id_transaksi generator count()+1 race; masked by SQLite serialization
findings.root_cause: TransaksiService.php:58-59 computes count+1 outside any row lock; concurrent requests collide on PK string(30).
findings.evidence: apps/api/app/Services/TransaksiService.php:58-60; migration 2026_06_01_000007 has id_transaksi as PK string(30).
repro: Two concurrent POST /api/transactions/pay in same second -> both compute TRX-YYMMDD-N; second insert 500s on PK violation (latent in SQLite, exploitable on MySQL/Postgres).
findings.fix: Use transaksi_seq row with lockForUpdate inside DB::transaction. Or add auto-increment surrogate id and derive id_transaksi from id. Add retry-once on QueryException 23000.
findings.refuter_verdict: CONFIRMED (latent; severity kept High not Critical because masked in current dev DB)

findings.title: Treatment terapis field is free-text; Terapis can impersonate other therapists
findings.root_cause: RekamMedisController::addTreatment validates 'terapis' as free string and stores verbatim; no auth-user binding.
findings.fix: Derive terapis from $request->user()->terapis. Drop 'terapis' from request validation. Add AuditService::log('treatment.add', $pasien->id).

findings.title: No Idempotency-Key on /api/transactions/pay; retry duplicates transaction
findings.root_cause: Endpoint accepts no client request id; replays produce N independent TRX with N stock decrements.
findings.evidence: BB-10 reproduction: 5 sequential identical POSTs -> 5x 201, TRX-021..025, 5x stock decrement, 5x commission.
repro: POST /api/transactions/pay identical body 5 times -> 5x 201, 5x stock decrement.
findings.fix: Read Idempotency-Key header; cache (key => response) for 24h; return cached response on replay. Wrap payment controller with the middleware.

findings.title: Terapis not bound to patient assignment; any Terapis writes any patient
findings.root_cause: No pasien_terapis pivot; no controller check that auth Terapis owns the patient record.
findings.fix: Add pasien_terapis pivot migration. In controller: abort_unless($user->level==='Manajer' || DB::table('pasien_terapis')->where('pasien_id',$id)->where('terapis_id',$authTerapis->id)->exists(), 403).

findings.title: Stored XSS surface in metode_bayar and supplier (loose validation; FE currently safe)
findings.root_cause: metode_bayar validated as 'nullable|string|max:32'; supplier as 'required|string|max:60'. No character filter. Refuter confirmed current Vue FE auto-escapes via {{ }} and has no v-html sink.
findings.evidence: apps/api/app/Http/Controllers/Api/TransaksiController.php:21; InventarisController.php:16; refuter verify_rce_xss.json WB-3 and GB-003-supplier-XSS REFUTED for current FE.
findings.refuter_verdict: XSS in current FE REFUTED; kept as Medium (validation gap only)

findings.title: Discount silently coerced to 0; qty=99999 accepted (Rp28.5 milyar transaction)
findings.root_cause: Controller casts/coerces discount to 0; no upper bound on qty or subtotal.

findings.title: Duplicate kode_batch in /api/inventory/purchases silently accepted
findings.root_cause: No UNIQUE(produk_id, kode_batch) constraint; no merge logic; duplicate batches with different HPP corrupt FIFO.
repro: POST /api/inventory/purchases produk_id=1, kode_batch='BS-0526-B', qty=5, hpp=90000 -> 201, second row with same code.

findings.title: Path traversal in kode_batch accepted; 404/405/500 responses leak full stack trace
findings.root_cause: kode_batch regex not constrained; ../../etc/passwd accepted and stored. APP_DEBUG=true amplifies all 4xx/5xx to leak file/line/trace.
findings.evidence: BB-8 (kode_batch='../../etc/passwd' -> 201); BB-11 (405 verbose); BB-17 (404 with wrong-model error on /transactions/999).
repro: GET /api/transactions/999 -> 404 'No query results for model [Pasien] 99' (implicit binding wrong).
findings.fix: 'kode_batch' => ['required','string','max:30','regex:/^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$/', reject '..' segments]. APP_DEBUG=false outside local. Fix implicit binding in wrong controller.

findings.title: CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on authenticated endpoints
findings.root_cause: Laravel HandleCors default returns wildcard; no per-route allowlist; no Access-Control-Allow-Credentials set.
repro: curl -i -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/transactions/pay -H 'Origin: http://evil.com' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -> 200 with wildcard.
findings.fix: config/cors.php: 'allowed_origins' => ['https://app.simkk.local'], 'supports_credentials' => true. Add StrictOrigin middleware rejecting mismatched Origin on POST/PUT/DELETE.

findings.title: Commission computed on subtotal even when total=0 (ghost commission)
findings.root_cause: TransaksiService.php:42,72 computes lineKomisi against line subtotal, not (subtotal - lineDiscountShare). With diskon >= subtotal, total=0 but commission still paid.

findings.title: Form-urlencoded body accepted on JSON-only endpoints (CSRF footgun)
findings.root_cause: No Content-Type: application/json check; Laravel re-parses form body into Request input.

findings.title: Empty items:[] returns misleading 'field is required' instead of 'min:1'
findings.root_cause: Laravel's 'required|array|min:1' short-circuits to 'required' message for empty array.
findings.fix: Change to 'items' => 'present|array|min:1' and customize message via $messages.

findings.title: catatan field no length cap; /bootstrap returns unbounded notes (1MB accepted)
findings.root_cause: catatan => required|string with no max. /api/bootstrap returns all patients with all treatments+photos unfiltered.
findings.evidence: BB-14 (1MB catatan accepted); GB-017, GB-018 (bootstrap DoS).
repro: POST /api/patients/1/treatments catatan=1MB of 'A' -> 201; GET /api/bootstrap returns full 1MB string in treatments[].notes.
findings.fix: 'catatan' => 'required|string|max:5000'. Add pagination: BootstrapController limits to last 20 treatments/photos per patient.
findings.prd_section: Rekam Medis input validation / Bootstrap performance

findings.title: Contract/UX gaps: XLSX sheet name, missing GET /patients/{id}, no DELETE, no refund, user shape drift
findings.root_cause: phpoffice default sheet name 'Worksheet'; no resource controllers for /api/patients/{id}, /api/services, /api/therapists; no DELETE; no POST /api/transactions/{id}/refund; login uses 'nama_lengkap' but bootstrap uses 'name'; bootstrap missing 'alamat' field.
findings.evidence: BB-16 (sheet name); GB-019 (no DELETE); GB-020 (no refund); GB-023 (no GET patient); GB-015 (user shape drift); GB-008 (missing alamat).
repro: Unzip commission.xlsx -> 'Worksheet' (default). POST /api/patients/1/treatments then no GET to re-fetch single patient.
findings.fix: $sheet->setTitle('Komisi Terapis'). Add resource controllers. Add DELETE endpoints (Manajer). Add POST /api/transactions/{id}/refund. Unify user shape. Add 'alamat' => $p->alamat to BootstrapController.

findings.title: /api/bootstrap is GET-only, not POST as spec states; 405 returns verbose trace
findings.root_cause: Spec says POST; route is GET. APP_DEBUG renders 405 with full stack trace.
repro: POST /api/bootstrap with valid token -> 405 with verbose exception. GET works.
findings.fix: Accept both verbs (Route::match(['get','post'],...)) OR document GET. APP_DEBUG=false outside local.

rejected_findings.verdict: REFUTED on php artisan serve (static-only, base64 returned verbatim); severity downgraded from Critical to High, finding kept as F-001
REFUTED (preg_replace strips slashes, hardcoded 'clinical/' prefix pins files)

rejected_findings.claim: Script tag in metode_bayar executes in FE
rejected_findings.verdict: REFUTED (Vue {{ }} escapes, no v-html in PosView.vue); validation gap kept as F-008

rejected_findings.claim: Script tag in supplier executes in FE
rejected_findings.verdict: REFUTED (Vue {{ }} escapes, no v-html in InventoryView.vue); validation gap kept as F-008
REFUTED (source review: finance-pdf.blade.php uses @forelse placeholder, rows from BukuKas)
REFUTED (drift = TRX-2505-032 Menunggu 520.000 with no BukuKas row by design; only Lunas flows to ledger)
